title: ficus stellaris subsp. stellaris
intro: Ficus stellaris subsp. stellaris, also known as the 'Venus fig', is a type of fig tree that is native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ficus stellaris subsp. stellaris are said to include reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, but more research is needed to fully understand its medicinal potential.
